_comment: Before/after pairs for the BeforeAfter slider (supplement §3.3). HARD RULE: both images in a pair MUST be the SAME property, personally verified, and described as the ACTUAL work done. The slider visually implies 'this house before -> this house after', so a mismatched pair, or a mislabeled job, would be a lie the component tells for you. The one pair below is a confirmed same-home job (the 321 house in Hot Springs): 315032150 is that home mid-remodel with our crew on ladders; 315007268 is the same home finished. Per the owner (2026-07-16) this was an EXTERIOR REMODEL — siding, paint, porch, and a new metal porch roof — NOT a roof-only job, so it is labeled as a remodel. Add more pairs only for genuine same-home before/after shots, labeled as the real work.

pairs.beforeAlt: A weathered white two-story Hot Springs home mid-remodel, with a worn porch roof and a Speedy Gonzalez crew on ladders
pairs.afterAlt: The same Hot Springs home after an exterior remodel, with fresh white siding, a new gray metal porch roof, white columns, and a yellow front door
pairs.caption: Same Hot Springs home, before and after a full exterior remodel — siding, trim, porch, and a new metal porch roof.
